decisions.proposal: Source-accounting accuracy must equal 1.0 and balance errors must equal 0.
Set a noninferiority band against the first chronology-emitting baseline.
Require source coverage 1.0; set ordering band after the first emitting baseline.
Set macro-F1 and per-class recall bands after a recorded live-model baseline.
Require evidence validity 1.0; set abstention band after the first emitting baseline.
Completeness false-claim rate must equal 0.
Allow no accepted overflow; set utilization and estimate-error bands after exact-token baseline.
Silent overflow count must equal 0 and supported overflow recovery must equal 1.0.
Set per-format CER bands after normalized extraction goldens emit.
Set typed-field precision, recall, and F1 bands after the first emitting baseline.
Cross-matter leak count must equal 0.
Stale-detection precision and recall must both equal 1.0.
Revision-and-locator round-trip accuracy must equal 1.0 once golden locators emit.
Complete claims require recall 1.0 on safety fixtures; set quality band after engine baseline.
Deterministic negative false-accept rate must equal 0.
Longer-worse adversarial selection accuracy must equal 1.0; set corpus band after baseline.
Low-confidence false-clean count must equal 0; set calibration band after baseline.
Use a plus-or-minus 10 percent p50 and p95 regression budget on fixed hardware.
Use a plus-or-minus 10 percent throughput budget; set memory ceiling after fixed-hardware baseline.
Unaffected-document work must equal 0; set wall-time and touched-row bands after baseline.
Terminal recovery accounting must equal 1.0; set duplicate-work ceiling after durable-ledger baseline.
Require v2 noninferiority to the frozen v1 Recall-at-8, Recall-at-12, and Recall-at-40 values.
Set the required full-evidence-set improvement over the frozen 0.625 baseline before the v2 flip.
Set node-and-edge precision, recall, and F1 bands after structure nodes emit.
Deterministic support false-accept rate must equal 0.
Core table-header association accuracy must equal 1.0; set expansion band after baseline.
Set relation precision and recall bands by kind after the relation engine emits.
Ambiguous unreviewed cases must be blocked at rate 1.0; set reviewed-state accuracy after baseline.
